name: Alamo Bus Co
recent_news: Alamogordo Public Schools Board voted April 24, 2019 to move transportation in-house effective July 1, 2019, terminating Alamo Bus Co's contract. Company filed Chapter bankruptcy (Case 1:19-bk-11568) in New Mexico Bankruptcy Court in 2019. Likely defunct as operating school-bus contractor.
website: unknown (alamobusservice.com is a different Houston TX company)
fit_notes: NOT a viable tuck-in: lost sole district contract to in-housing in 2019 and filed bankruptcy same year. Company appears defunct. Skip.

name: Nova Bus Inc
recent_news: No evidence of an operating school-bus contractor named 'Nova Bus Inc' in Roswell NM. RISD's official contractor list shows only Hamill Transportation and Pollard Bus Co (DBA of Estes Transportation). The well-known Nova Bus is a Volvo-owned Quebec transit bus manufacturer that closed its Roswell plant in 2002 (successor Millennium Transit Services became defunct ~2012); not a school-bus operator. Likely defunct or misclassified listing.
fit_notes: NOT a viable tuck-in: no evidence of operating private school-bus contractor at this address; RISD uses Hamill and Pollard. Either defunct, dormant shell, or directory misclassification of the transit manufacturer. Skip.

name: Kidzjet
principals: unknown (KidzJet LLC management not publicly disclosed)
districts_or_customers: SF Bay Area private schools and parent subscribers
recent_news: Active as of 2025-2026; operates pre-scheduled rideshare for kids ages 4-17 across SF Bay Area counties with custom parent-tracking app; claims 500,000+ rides completed; also operates KidzJet Adventures outdoor science camps.
fit_notes: Marginal fit: Kidzjet is a tech-enabled kids rideshare/shuttle for private schools and parent subscribers (more like HopSkipDrive/Zum than a traditional yellow-bus district contractor). Doesn't run district yellow-bus contracts. Sub-scale (3 employees in source data). Only relevant if Summit wants to add a Bay Area private-school/alt-transport tech tuck-in; otherwise low fit.

name: Don's Bus Svc
principals: Donald 'Don' Barthel (founder, d. 2014); Albert Barthel (current Owner/Manager/CEO); Jason Barthel (next-gen, per LinkedIn at Don's Bus Service Inc.)
recent_news: Founder Donald Barthel died August 2014 after 50+ years serving local schools; business continues under Barthel family (Albert, with Jason Barthel involved per LinkedIn). Long-standing Albertville cornerstone serving STMA district.
website: none of its own (district contract via stma.k12.mn.us); D&B and BBB listings only
fit_notes: Solid small family-owned tuck-in candidate: 65+ years of continuous Barthel-family ownership serving a single growing exurban district (STMA) NW of Minneapolis. Founder deceased, gen-2/3 transition underway - real succession optionality. ~25 buses/$1.5M revenue is sub-scale alone but clean bolt-on for a Twin Cities MN cluster build.

name: Steve's School Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: SAU 63 area (Lyndeborough / Wilton / Mont Vernon NH)
recent_news: No M&A or notable news. Active small operator with 4.6-4.9 star local reviews; combined school-bus operation and full-service auto/truck repair garage at 352 Center Rd, Lyndeborough.
website: none of its own (district site sau63.org used); BBB / Yelp / Manta listings
fit_notes: Very small owner-operator (4 employees, single small SAU contract) with combined repair-shop business; sub-scale for a stand-alone Summit tuck-in. Would only be relevant as a micro-bolt-on if Summit is rolling up a southern-NH cluster; otherwise low priority.
